summary: Figma Steps 支持 2-5 步，步骤图标 32px 圆形，完成态浅蓝底蓝边，当前态品牌蓝底，待完成态浅灰底灰边，连接线 1px。

extracted.colors: done bg #E6F2FD border #0067D1; current bg #0067D1 text #FFFFFF; pending bg rgba(25,25,25,0.05) border #C9C9C9; connector #0067D1/#DFDFDF
extracted.layout: horizontal flex; icon above title/helper; connector centered to icon
extracted.variants: 2 / 3 / 4 / 5 steps; 完成 / 当前 / 待完成
